creator: petr.fischer@me.com
text:
Oh yes, patch was in:
/usr/ports/net/py-rainbowstream

then cleaned, rebuilded, reinstalled.

You moved pocket in patch-setup.py from install_requires to extras_require, right?
But in FreeBSD, there is no package for "python pocket" and installation was also fine before.
Maybe rainbowstream checks this in runtime (extras_require is also required for app start). What about cleaning pocket dep completely?

Can I check resulting installed package (in some source?), if patch was applied correctly?

Thanks!
